examples: Calcium may aid in the prevention of colon cancer.
In the U.S., there are 60,000 deaths a year from colon cancer.
Berle was diagnosed with colon cancer last year and had been under hospice care for the past few weeks.
When she started chemotherapy for colon cancer, the side effects included a "nuclear implosion" of nausea.
With colon cancer, you see, screening tests save lives at very low risk of harm.
